query:
SELECT ce.id, ce.nomeCiclo, ce.dataInicio, ce.dataFim, a.nome as aluno_nome, t.name as turma_nome
FROM ciclos_execucao ce 
JOIN alunos a ON ce.alunoId = a.id 
JOIN turmas t ON a.turmaId = t.id 
WHERE t.name LIKE '%BS2%' 
ORDER BY ce.dataInicio 
LIMIT 20;
